title: Semantic Analogies
code:
import numpy as np

def run_practice():
    matrix = np.array([[1.0, 0.0], [0.0, 1.0], [0.7, 0.7]])
    vocab = ['a', 'b', 'c']
    target = np.array([0.5, 0.5])
    scores = np.dot(matrix, target) / (np.linalg.norm(matrix, axis=1) * np.linalg.norm(target))
    assert np.argmax(scores) == 2
    print('[PASS] Analogy argmax validated.')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    run_practice()
